legacy.full_text:
I joined the space in 2021. Never saw a cross-project activation as BIG as the one we're working on at Kaze.

To highlight true builders,
Artists,
Communities.

To make real NFT noise and show the unique, beautiful things these assets enable.

Together.

Kickstart the vibes 🔥 https://t.co/OucnaDP8qc
